input.description: List all folders in current directory

data.output:
apps/
dev/
docs/
node_modules/
packages/
scripts/
test/

data.content:
The folders in the current directory are:

- `apps/` - Application code (web, cli)
- `dev/` - Development utilities
- `docs/` - Documentation
- `node_modules/` - Dependencies
- `packages/` - Shared packages
- `scripts/` - Build/utility scripts
- `test/` - Test files
